title: Huawei OSX002003, GPON OLT SFP optical module, Class C+
description: The Huawei OSX002003 GPON SFP module is designed for slots in Huawei OLT units. It is a C+ class module, terminated with an SC connector with UPC polishing, offering a transmission distance of up to 60km and supporting asymmetric data rates of 2.5Gbps download and 1.2Gbps upload . The module's TX power range is from 3 to 7dBm and the RX sensitivity is -32dBm
